jira.notes: Timeline rows in outcomes[] are canonical for WB-Outcome-Map.html; edit this file first, then refresh #wb-outcomes-fallback in the HTML. Populate keys when Jira hierarchy exists; run node Scripts/jira-export-wb.js. Keep in sync with WB-WBS.md §11.

outcome_map.notes: 18 columns = program months M1–M18 (indicative; calendar TBD in WB-WBS).

outcomes.title: [WB-OC-01] Alignment & Instrumentation Complete
outcomes.name: Alignment & Instrumentation
outcomes.detail: Governance charter, Scorecard v0, segmentation in 360, incident process documented.

outcomes.title: [WB-OC-02] Prove Flow & Communications Complete
outcomes.name: Prove Flow & Communications
outcomes.detail: MIM, Agility Core + Other Products pods, Enterprise vs Commercial SLOs, FCR baseline.

outcomes.title: [WB-OC-03] Full Pod Scale Complete
outcomes.name: Full Pod Scale
outcomes.detail: All Agility pods, fast-lane, routing optimization; ~15% handling reduction target.

outcomes.title: [WB-OC-04] Tooling Selection & AI Layer Complete
outcomes.name: Tooling & AI Layer
outcomes.detail: SaaS RFP through contract; Agentic AI pilot through rollout; migration blueprint.

outcomes.title: [WB-OC-05] Platform Migration & Institutionalization Complete
outcomes.name: Platform Migration
outcomes.detail: Configure platform, pilot + full migration, freeze 360 for Support, benefits realization.
